qa_pair.question: In the reliability fixture that rotates three simple words for exactly 100 lines, how many lines contain the first word in the rotation? Answer with a number only.
The duplicate-marker fixture has several repeated generic sections and one contrasting unique section near the end. What exact text appears inside the unique section?
Use the fixed-width numbered-lines fixture. What is the full content of line 042?
In the browser-style manifest JSON fixture, what is the value of the top-level name field?
In the same manifest fixture, what permission appears between fileSystem and clipboard?
Find the deeply nested text fixture five directories below nested/. What is its file name?
The testing notes describe the tiny Python helper source. How many lines does that tiny helper file have? Answer with a number only.
In the ambiguous marker fixture, what content is inside the third repeated generic section?
In the TypeScript generated-code fixture, what TODO comment text appears inside the generated code?
In the testing notes, which fixture is described as the append/prepend target? Answer with the path exactly as written in the heading.
